user.title: Connect to your Victron GX device
user.description: Enter the address of the Cerbo GX (or other Venus OS device). The portal ID is detected automatically.

relays.title: Name the Cerbo GX relays
relays.description: Give the two relays meaningful names for this install (e.g. Internal Fan, External Fan). You can change these later in Options.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the MQTT broker. Check the address and that MQTT is enabled on the GX device.
error.no_portal: Connected, but no Venus portal was detected. Is this a Victron GX device?

abort.already_configured: This GX device is already configured.

data.ssh_key_path: SSH private key path (for Reboot SSH button)
